svg.title: Livepeer six-persona routing flow
svg.desc: Six developer personas mapped to landing tabs, infrastructure options, and where the documentation lives. Personas one and six route to Solutions, Gateways, About, and Community. Personas two, three, four, and five route to the Developers tab.

g.text: or video APIs from a product
Build — two tracks, depth lives here
Reference — APIs + SDKs only (protocol → About; ecosystem → Community)

svg.text: Personas 2, 3, 4 share Pipeline track. Persona 5 owns Application track. Personas 1 and 6 acknowledged but route out.
